session.user: Run the tests for the incremental dispatch module and report results: uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_incremental_dispatch.py -v Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest tests for the incremental dispatch module and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run incremental dispatch tests with verbose output
